violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
One hand sink built into the counter in the upstairs kitchen was nonfunctional, blocked by a convection oven over the sink, and faucets removed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and mixer bowl) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and orange biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Eggplant, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
Procedures for date marking would allow for food to be disposed of after 8 days instead of 7. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
Corned beef observed marked with dates exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2026
Working containers (spray bottles) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Eggplant was placed hot in the refrigerator in container greater than four inches deep. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Croissants packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Croissants were removed from self service area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2026

Working containers of several ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
( ) were observed stored on the floor in the upstairs walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
Downstairs ice bucket was not stored inverted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the upstairs hallway storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the downstairs bar storage area, and in the upstairs areas. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener baseupstairs prep unit6 burner stovefryerfreezerpizza stonelids for dry ingredient bins upstairsrobot coupe baseVitamix basefreezers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
The knife rack wall in the upstairs kitchen is in poor repair, with the surface shredded. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

The cabinet beneath the hand sink in the upstairs kitchen has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The floors in the upstairs kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris, especially near the fryers. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The screen on the air intake screen above the upstairs ice machine has an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2026
Mops were observed stored wet in mop buckets.Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2026

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on a dry storage shelf in the downstairs kitchen, and blocking the hand sink in the upstairs kitchen. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with sticker debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was taken out of service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

Various foods packaged in the food establishment are complete lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025
The hand-washing sink in the bar was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
An ice bucket was observed draining into the hand sink in WXYZ stock room. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

Raw animal foods (whole shell and liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cheese and beverages) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

Per interview, staff washed dishes and utensils in detergent and chlorine, followed by rinsing with water. Inspector informed PIC of proper procedures; PIC spoke with staff. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

Pre-packaged egg sandwiches were observed held at 54 degrees Fahrenheit above the fill line in the Refuel prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per staff, sandwiches were recently taken from freezer to thaw; sandwiches were placed under fill line. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

Trays of ingredients were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

Working containers of oil are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

Pastries and parfaits packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the main kitchen. Inspector provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sinks; facility is lacking test strips to test the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the bar dish machines. Inspector provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
The dish machines at the small kitchen and the WXYZ bar failed to dispense sanitizer during inspection. PIC to contact for service. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -ice machines -under prep unit hood (upstairs) -can opener -under grill -fryer. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
